rulings.Case Title: MATT WATKINS PHD VS. ANDREW CHUA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint'S First, Fifth, Sixth, Twelfth, Thirteenth, And Fifteenth Causes Of Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support (Per Insistence Of Filer)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA MIRANDA VS. JESSICA KRIEGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 16, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT GESSIKA KRIEGER's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES DENIED. Lease and addendum to the lease do not provide for recovery of attorneys fees in this type of action to either landlord or tenant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA MIRANDA VS. JESSICA KRIEGER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 16, 2015, line 8. PLAINTIFF MARTHA MIRANDA's Motion To Tax Costs GRANTED. The total amount of recoverable costs is $2,797.2. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. ABENET TEKIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Second Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Bay Property Group' Request For Montetary Sanctions Of $3,060.00 Against Plaintiff And Its Counsel Jointly And Severally
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 16, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANTs ABENET TEKIE and ARIEL BANTOLILA's Motion For Terminating Sanctions: Hearing Required. Plaintiff shall provide to the Court and to Defendants by no later than 9:00 a.m. on March 16, 2014 a table that should include in column 1:the number and the text of the discovery request at issue in this motion; and column 2: the number and the text of the response, included in December 24, 2015 supplemental response, that Plaintiff contends is responsive to the request. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KARLA MELARA VS. JAN I HOLMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Establish Admissions From Plaintiffs, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, March 16, 2015, Line 11, DEFENDANT STEVEN HULSEY's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff: is DENIED, moot. rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. JAMES A. BULLOCH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, March 16, 2015, Line 12, DEFENDANT JAMES BULLOCH's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint: Summons is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege whether agreement was oral, written, or implied; and to attach the agreement if it was written. Motion is otherwise denied - requisite relationship between Plaintiff and Defendant is sufficiently alleged; Plaintiff complied with re-rental rights notice requirements. Objections to RJN are sustained. = (501/CFH)
